description:
You are acting as a database administrator who wants every new terminal session to use
    Post-greSQL client settings that make query tuning easier.  
    Perform the following configuration steps on the current Linux system
    (home directory: /home/user).

    1. Open the file /home/user/.bashrc.  
       • Append the two lines shown below **exactly as written, on their own new lines**  
         (do not add leading/trailing spaces, comments, or quote marks).  
         
         export PGTZ='UTC'  
         export PGOPTIONS='--client-min-messages=warning -c default_statistics_target=500'

    2. Create a log file at /home/user/db_env_config.log that will be used for automated
       verification.  
       • The log file must contain **exactly** the two lines shown below, in the same order,
         with a single newline character (ASCII 0x0A) after each line and **no extra blank
         lines**:  

         CONFIGURED PGTZ=UTC  
         CONFIGURED PGOPTIONS=--client-min-messages=warning -c default_statistics_target=500

    3. The changes must be persistent; therefore sourcing the file is optional, but the
       modifications to /home/user/.bashrc and the presence & contents of
       /home/user/db_env_config.log will be used for grading.

    Output requirements checked by the automated test:
       • /home/user/.bashrc contains both new export lines exactly once each.
       • /home/user/db_env_config.log exists and its content matches the two-line format
         specified above, with no extra whitespace or lines.
truth:
The grading script will confirm:

    1. /home/user/.bashrc ends with these two lines (order can be anywhere in the file,
       but there must be exactly one occurrence of each line):
         export PGTZ='UTC'
         export PGOPTIONS='--client-min-messages=warning -c default_statistics_target=500'

    2. /home/user/db_env_config.log exists with byte-exact content:
         CONFIGURED PGTZ=UTC\n
         CONFIGURED PGOPTIONS=--client-min-messages=warning -c default_statistics_target=500\n
